svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="ClassDiagram" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-794" dy="-241" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1560" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Class Diagram — Checkout / Fulfillment domain (layered)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="900" x="40" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CheckoutCtrl" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="<i>&laquo;Controller&raquo;</i><br><b>CheckoutController</b><hr>+ checkout(idemKey, req): OrderView" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OrderCtrl" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="<i>&laquo;Controller&raquo;</i><br><b>VendorOrderController</b><hr>+ accept(id) / reject(id)<br>+ preparing(id) / ready(id)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="340" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DispatchCtrl" parent="1" value="<i>&laquo;Controller&raquo;</i><br><b>DispatchController</b><hr>+ accept(job) / reject(job)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="660" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DeliveryCtrl" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="<i>&laquo;Controller&raquo;</i><br><b>DeliveryController</b><hr>+ pickedUp / onRoute<br>+ confirmDelivery(otp)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="980" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CheckoutSvc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="<i>&laquo;Service&raquo;</i><br><b>CheckoutService</b><hr>+ checkout(key, cmd): Order<br>- one tx: cart→order→pay→delivery" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="40" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OrderSvc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DispatchSvc" parent="1" value="<i>&laquo;Service&raquo;</i><br><b>DispatchService</b><hr>+ dispatch(order)<br>+ accept() + reassign()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="660" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DeliverySvc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" </mxCell> <mxCell id="PaymentSvc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;"
